title: Filipino Fish Soup
description: A hearty and flavorful Filipino-inspired fish soup, perfect for a comforting meal. This dish is rich in protein and can be served with a side of steamed rice.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic and sauté until softened.
Add fish and cook until browned on both sides.
Add soup, fish sauce (if using), salt, and pepper.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10-15 minutes.
Add tomato and green chili, and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped green onions (optional).
Cook time can be adjusted to suit your preference for the fish to be cooked through.
Serve with steamed rice for a filling meal.
